scripts.pages:build:www: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter marketing-web run build
scripts.verify: pnpm --filter marketing-web run typecheck && pnpm --filter marketing-web run build && pnpm --filter public-docs run build
scripts.deploy:docs-router: echo 'Deprecated: docs.newsfork.com is served from nl-public-docs Pages; docs-router is no longer deployed.' && exit 1
